title: calcarunia hastata
intro: Calcarunia hastata, also known as Indian mulberry or Caesalpinia, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calcarunia hastata include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Calcarunia hastata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to create teas, capsules, and topical creams for various therapeutic applications.
